log_directory.description: Directory for storing internal log files

max_file_size_mb.description: Maximum size of each log file in MB

max_files.description: Maximum number of log files to keep

compress_old_files.description: Compress old log files with gzip

include_request_headers.description: Include HTTP request headers in logs

include_response_headers.description: Include HTTP response headers in logs

include_payload_content.description: Include request/response payload content in logs

mask_sensitive_data.description: Mask sensitive data in logs (API keys, tokens, etc.)

sensitive_keys.description: List of sensitive keys to mask in logs

correlation_id_header.description: HTTP header name for correlation ID

enable_error_tracking.description: Enable detailed error tracking and logging
